prestazioni: Engine: Rotax ACE 900cc turbocharged (engine code: ACE-900T) – Full forged internals upgrade with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, JE 9.5:1 forged pistons, and ACL Race Series bearings for 30+ psi boost capability. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and Turbosmart Comp-Gate40 wastegate for precise boost control.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors (side-feed) with a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator and dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pumps. ECU reflash via Dynojet Power Vision tuner with custom maps for E85 compatibility and 220+ HP at the wheels.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX22M 2-way adjustable coilovers with 300mm travel, paired with Fox Racing Shox 2.5 Podium Series bypass shocks (remote reservoirs) and a custom-fabricated chromoly front A-arm brace by RPM Racing. Rear sway bar upgraded to a 25mm adjustable unit from S3 Powersports.
estetica: Aero: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion kit by Can-Am Racing Composites (X3-XR spec), including extended fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser with integrated LED light pods. Rear wing upgrade to a 3-piece adjustable carbon fiber unit from APR Performance (GTC-300 model).

Lighting: Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (50W each) mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack by Cognito Motorsports, with a Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar (30-inch) integrated into the front bumper.

Interior: Full custom roll cage by Chase Racing (chromoly 4130) with integrated harness bar and Sparco 6-point harnesses. Seats replaced with PRP Racing X3-specific bucket seats (carbon fiber shell) and a custom aluminum dash panel by UTV Inc. housing a Motec C127 digital dash.
